economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted service delivery and GBE contracting revenue. GBEs include Alexander Business Centre Inc., Alexander Gas Bar Inc., Alexander Contracting & Construction Services (GP) Inc., Alexander Commercial Developments Inc., Alexander Industry Relations Corporation, and Two Creeks Energy Inc. Nation provided $750,000 operational support to Alexander Business Centre Group of Companies. ISC compliance review of 2010-2016 expenditures ongoing with no settlement.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Alexander Employment and Labour Services Ltd., 824750 Alberta Ltd. (o/a Alexander Forestry Services), Alexander First Nation Farm Enterprises. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Per Capita Distribution of $2,206,924 recorded as expense with no corresponding budget. $750,000 operational support provided to Alexander Business Centre Group of Companies. ISC compliance review for 2010-2016 expenditures is ongoing. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $602,318. Net financial debt position. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($24,104,605 gross before deferred adjustments) + Province of Alberta ($2,000,327) + CMHC ($617,636) + Service Canada ($371,542) + FNDF ($346,895) + Capital and revenue trust funds ($876,673) + Land Surrender Claim ($1,635,877) = approximately $29,953,555; OSR includes Other revenue ($5,827,765) minus farm/forestry/other items already in other categories. Revenue lines include deferred revenue movements. No remuneration schedule found in provided text.
